topics.label: EVAL & Scripts
topics.description: EVAL 'lua code' numkeys keys args. Execute Lua atomically in Redis.

topics.label: redis.call
topics.description: Call Redis commands from Lua. redis.call('GET', KEYS[1]).

topics.label: EVALSHA & Caching
topics.description: Cache scripts with SCRIPT LOAD. Call with EVALSHA for performance.

topics.label: Functions (Redis 7+)
topics.description: redis.register_function for persistent, named server-side functions.
